backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor with no logic implemented.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping features to related files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing short descriptions of all frontend files and their roles.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind-based global stylesheet defining classic color variables, dark mode tokens, and base element styles.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point including SEO metadata and Google Fonts, loading the React app root.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React component composing all site sections with header and footer.
frontend/src/components/sections/Contact: Contact section showing phone, WhatsApp, location, hours, and a CTA card.
frontend/src/components/sections/Gallery: Responsive gallery section rendering images from content data with hover effects.
frontend/src/components/sections/HeroSec: Displays the homepage hero with background image, service intro text, and call/WhatsApp action buttons using business contact info.
frontend/src/components/sections/HowItWo: Renders a four-step workflow section by mapping howItWorks content into a grid layout.
frontend/src/components/sections/Service: Shows a grid of service cards with icons, pulling titles and descriptions from the services list.
frontend/src/components/sections/Testimo: Displays customer testimonials in a three-column grid with quote icons and author names.
frontend/src/components/sections/WhyChoo: Lists reasons to choose the business in a grid, pairing each item with an icon.
frontend/src/components/SiteFooter.tsx: Footer component with brand text, quick links, social icons, and attribution.
frontend/src/components/SiteHeader.tsx: Sticky header with scroll effects, navigation links, and mobile menu.
frontend/src/content/siteContent.ts: Exports business info plus arrays for services, how-it-works steps, reasons to choose us, testimonials, and gallery images.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor based on the current Internet Identity, refreshing dependent queries when it changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity provider and hook for managing auth state, login, logout, and identity persistence.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind styles, theme variables, dark mode overrides, and layout utilities for the app.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app, wrapping it with React Query and Internet Identity providers.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending colors, fonts, animations, and container settings, and enabling typography, container-queries, and animation plugins.
project_state.json: Project metadata describing the website's purpose, required images, known issues, and a list of implemented features with versioned requirement IDs.
